description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring a combination of light gray and wood-textured exterior panels. The front facade includes a small, landscaped entryway with a short fence, a main door, and large rectangular windows. The property is enclosed by a low wall and includes a driveway with parking space for two cars, as well as landscaped areas with trees and shrubs. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a patio area, outdoor seating, and additional greenery. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some extending from floor to ceiling, enhancing natural light. The overall structure is boxy and geometric, emphasizing clean lines and open outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, boxy two-story house with flat roofs, wood-textured and gray exterior panels, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway with two cars, and landscaped entry garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, carport, and a glimpse of the backyard patio and outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open backyard, patio area, and large glass doors leading outside.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wall, side garden, and outdoor seating area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small porch, short steps, and landscaped garden bordered by a low fence.
